calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-24-2017 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-24-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Hudson T. Bair of Kapsack & Bair LLP (510-434-1400) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Aaron Farkas of Castellon & Funderburk LLP (213-623-7515) appears telephonically as counsel for defendant/non-opposing party

Court hears from both sides. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment is Granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements of Proposition 65. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, bus. tel: (530) 339-5023, email: rhunter@sftc.org. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2016 Set For Trial On Apr-17-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
